p: This page is outside the root child tree but reachable through page-id and title links. It contains enough synthetic content to prove link-discovered pages are not thin placeholders.
Reference values: LINK-000, LINK-001, LINK-MANY-999, date 2026-05-04, currency-like USD 123.45, and Cyrillic sample пример ссылки.

ul.li: Bold note: linked pages may still have attachments.
Italic stale note: broken-link://linked-page is literal messy text.

ac:rich-text-body.p: Panel body references and duplicate title .
